title: Cpvp Hud
description: The best hud for cpvp for fps, armor durability, ping and so much more!
body:
**Cpvp HUD (Fabric 1.21+)**

Cpvp HUD is a clean and efficient HUD (heads-up display) mod made for PvP and general Minecraft gameplay. It focuses on giving you the most important information in an easy-to-read format, without overwhelming your screen. Whether you’re fighting, exploring, or just keeping track of performance, Cpvp HUD makes it simple.

🔹 Always-Visible HUD
	
    •	A basic HUD is always active.
	
    •	Displays your health as bars, so you can quickly tell your status at a glance.
	
    •	Easy to see and lightweight — perfect for PvP where every second matters.

🔹 Toggleable Display Options

Cpvp HUD includes simple hotkeys that let you cycle through extra information without digging through menus:
	
    •	[ key → Switches health display from bars to percentages for more precise info.
	
    •	] key → Cycles through additional data on your screen:
	
    1.	FPS only (great for performance monitoring).
	
    2.	FPS + Ping (know your connection speed in fights).
	
    3.	FPS + Ping + Coordinates (for exploration and PvP positioning).
	
    4.	Back to minimal mode (only the core HUD, nothing extra).

🔹 Why Use Cpvp HUD?
	
    •	PvP-friendly: Gives you critical stats quickly without clutter.
	
    •	Lightweight: Runs smoothly on Fabric 1.21+ with minimal performance impact.
	
    •	Customizable on the fly: Switch between simple or detailed info with a single key press.
	
    •	Exploration ready: Easily check your FPS, ping, and exact location when needed.

Whether you’re dueling, speedrunning, or just mining, Cpvp HUD keeps the right information at your fingertips.
